title: agathosma puberula
intro: Agathosma puberula, also known as the Round Leaved Oil-Tree, is a small shrub native to South Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agathosma puberula include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
